topics.summary: South Korea is holding its 9th simultaneous local elections on June 3, 2026, electing 16 provincial governors and hundreds of local offices alongside by-elections. Turnout as of midday surpassed the equivalent point in 2022 by 2.3 percentage points, and the results—expected around midnight—are widely framed as the first nationwide referendum on the Lee Jae-myung government.

evidence_headlines.title: [속보] 6·3 지방선거 투표율, 오전 10시 현재 11% … 4년 전보다 2.3%p 높아
[🔴LIVE] 2026 지방선거 뉴스특보 생중계 2026년 6월 3일(수)
16·14·19.7%‥숫자로 보는 지방선거

topics.summary: The appeal trial of former President Yoon Suk-yeol, who received a life sentence in the first instance for leading the December 3 insurrection, has been suspended after his defense team filed repeated judge recusal petitions; the Supreme Court must now rule before proceedings can resume. Multiple parallel trials—including new charges pursued by the second comprehensive special prosecutor—continue in parallel.

evidence_headlines.title: 내란 '무기징역'·위증 '무죄' 받은 윤석열 8개 재판 중간점검
윤석열·김용현, 내란 재판부 기피 또 불복…항소심 또 멈추나
'재판 위증' 윤석열 1심 무죄‥'주관적 평가 불과'

topics.topic_en: Seoul Mayoral Race DPK vs PPP
topics.summary: The Seoul mayoral contest—DPK's Jeong Won-o challenging incumbent PPP Mayor Oh Se-hoon—is the single highest-profile local race and is being covered as the key bellwether of nationwide public opinion. DPK frames the contest as a verdict on governance failures and safety scandals; PPP frames Jeong as a proxy for central government overreach.

evidence_headlines.title: 서울시장 선거 '주말 난타전'‥'무능한 시장' vs '준임명직 허수아비'
[MBC여론조사] 이 대통령 지지율, 서울·부산·대구 60% 넘겨

topics.summary: Former PPP leader Han Dong-hoon, expelled from the party, is running as an independent in the Busan Buk-gap by-election against DPK's Ha Jeong-u and PPP's Park Min-sik, creating a three-way race and exposing a deep PPP internal schism. Pre-election polls showed Han and the DPK candidate in a statistical tie while the official PPP candidate languished in third.

evidence_headlines.title: [MBC여론조사] 부산 북갑에서 한동훈·조국 '잠룡' 존재감
한동훈, 부산 북갑 판세 뒤집었다…박민식 향한 단일화 압박 가속
북구갑, 하정우 34.3%·한동훈 33.5%·박민식 21.5%

topics.topic_en: Constitutional Amendment Referendum Blocked by PPP
topics.summary: The Lee government's flagship constitutional amendment—backed by six parties including DPK and aimed at strengthening anti-martial-law provisions—was blocked from a simultaneous referendum on election day after PPP boycotted National Assembly votes in May, preventing the required quorum. The episode became a major election-eve attack line for DPK, which accused PPP of protecting Yoon-era interests.

evidence_headlines.title: 국회, 오늘 개헌안 재표결…투표 무산 땐 '6·3 동시투표' 불발
Speaker Woo Urges Constitutional Reform Referendum on Local Election Day
Cabinet approves motion to amend parts of the Constitution

topics.topic_en: DPK-Cho Guk Party Rivalry Jeonbuk and Pyeongtaek
topics.summary: In the Jeonbuk gubernatorial race and the Gyeonggi Pyeongtaek-eul by-election, infighting between DPK and Cho Guk's Rebuilding Korea Party has produced bitter intra-progressive clashes, with DPK expelling a candidate who aligned with an independent and Cho Guk's Cho Guk challenging DPK's nominee head-to-head. The result is seen as a test of DPK leader Jeong Cheong-rae's grip and his bid for party chair re-election.

evidence_headlines.title: 지도부 눈 쏠린 평택을·전북지사 선거‥정청래 '시험대'
선거운동 마지막날까지 평택과 전북에서 소모적인 내전만 한 여권
與野 대결보다 치열한 진영 내부 충돌…전북·평택을·부산북갑 과열 양상

topics.topic_en: PPP Leadership Crisis After Local Election Verdict
topics.summary: PPP chair Jang Dong-hyuk and the party leadership face an existential test: polling shows DPK at 45% party support versus PPP at 23%, and the party's 'Julyun' (절윤, distancing from Yoon) strategy is undermined by a slate of pro-Yoon candidates who received party nominations. A heavy local election defeat is widely predicted to trigger a leadership overhaul and fresh power struggle.

evidence_headlines.title: 정치 명운 걸린 정청래·장동혁…결과 따라 당내 권력지형 변화 불가피
이재명 대통령 지지율 61%, 민주당 45%·국민의힘 23%

topics.summary: Following the 2025 Korea-US tariff deal that averted 25% duties, Seoul now faces a new wave of US non-tariff barriers including digital regulations and supply-chain requirements, while Korea's Q1 2026 GDP posted a slight contraction. The economy remains a secondary but growing electoral concern, with DPK government credibility on trade management under scrutiny.

evidence_headlines.title: '관세 장벽'이 끝 아니었다, 정부 2026년 '비관세 장벽' 대응에 나선다
2025년 세계 무역 전쟁/대한민국

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
